emails.subject: Re: Grading
emails.body: Re: Grading Graders usually follow the following guidelines: Half of the class gets A- and above; The other half of the class gets B+ and below Instructors seldom ever give grades below B-, but it happens in rare cases The highest grade possible is A+ Jason
